metadata.no_auto_align_reason: Fresh TrackCenter and immediate pODMR evidence support r03; use explicit current tracked position and avoid hidden reselection.
metadata.frequency_basis: weak-pi pODMR grid minimum at 3.876 GHz; descriptive fit is not used as hard center
metadata.fft_sampling_reason: Revised after advisory for 8 us/51 points exceeded the 450 s tracking cap. 31 points over 6 us keep per-average window shorter, give 166667 Hz FFT bin spacing and 2500000 Hz Nyquist, covering det=1.5 MHz plus ~384615 Hz 13C sideband plus +/-0.5 MHz pODMR center uncertainty (needed 2384615 Hz).
metadata.shot_reason: Use 4 x 50000 = 200000 shots per point, matching the weak-pODMR scout SNR while keeping an even number of snake-ordered averages.
metadata.even_average_reason: Use 4 averages under snake/even-average guidance and recent drift risk.
metadata.advisory_revision_reason: Initial 8 us/51 point Ramsey preview estimated 690 s per average, above the 450 s drift cap; reduce tau points/span before execute as required by drift guidance.
metadata.intent: First bounded Ramsey/T2star scout on accepted aligned r03 using weak-pi pODMR mw_freq=3.876 GHz; analyze raw Ramsey and FFT before claiming T2star or 13C.
